answer: Anthropic was founded in 2021 by former employees of OpenAI, focusing on AI safety and ethical development. The company developed "Constitutional AI" to embed human values in its models. Anthropic's founders left due to ethical concerns at their previous employer.

results.title: Anthropic Business Breakdown & Founding Story - Contrary Research
results.snippet: Amongst foundation model developers, Anthropic has positioned itself as a company with a particular focus on AI safety and describes itself as building “AI research and products that put safety at the frontier.” Founded by engineers who quit OpenAI due to tension over ethical and safety concerns, Anthropic has developed its own method to train and deploy “Constitutional AI”, or large language models (LLMs) with embedded values that can be controlled by humans. results.title: What Is Anthropic? | Built In
results.snippet: Summary:  Anthropic is an AI safety and research company best known for developing the Claude chatbot and family of language models. more   Anthropic is an AI safety and research company best known for developing the Claude chatbot and family of language models. Anthropic is an AI research and development startup known for its Claude chatbot and LLMs. The company also focuses on safety and ethics, encouraging responsible innovation across the artificial intelligence industry. With that said, Anthropic claims its Claude Sonnet 4.5 model outperforms OpenAI’s GPT-5 model on several standard evaluation benchmarks for AI systems — including agentic coding and agentic tool use, computer use and financial analysis. This funding round closely follows the release of Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.5 model and comes amid a broader surge in investor demand for frontier AI developers. Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 4.5, its strongest model at the time for coding and building complex AI agents.

results.title: MicroVentures' Portfolio Company: Anthropic's History and Milestones
results.snippet: # MicroVentures’ Portfolio Company: Anthropic’s History and Milestones. # MicroVentures. Anthropic has positioned itself in the artificial intelligence (AI) race as a company dedicated to developing safe, ethical, and accurate AI systems. In this blog, learn more about Anthropic’s founding story, Anthropic’s history and milestones, its products, and funding. # **Anthropic’s History and Milestones**. Previously serving as executives at OpenAI, the two left the company in 2020 alongside five other colleagues due to concerns over a lack of commitment to safety. The group believed AI development needed a stronger emphasis on safety, interpretability, and alignment with human values. ## **Anthropic’s Products**. At the core of Anthropic’s work and central to its goal of safe and ethical AI, Constitutional AI represents a framework that AI must refer to and implement whenever responding to user inquiries. Anthropic has positioned itself as a leader in safe and ethical AI development, distinguishing itself from competitors with its focus on alignment and transparency.
